title: Aligning PAYE and Overseas Workday Relief
body: "This measure restricts the in-year Overseas Workday Relief that employers can provide to their eligible employees to no more than 30% of their income. It:   limits the proportion of income excluded from PAYE on the section 690 PAYE notification form that employers sent to HMRC aligns the in-year relief with the amount an employee can claim on their Self Assessment tax return  "
